---
title: "Yale Library Data Listing"
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-banner}
# Yale Library Data Listing

Discover datasets, databases, and research resources available through Yale Library.

[Browse the catalog](datasets.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

## What you can find here

This prototype catalog includes licensed databases, datasets available by request, open data resources, data platforms, news and market research tools, and other resources useful for data-intensive research.

## Browse by need

- **Business & Economics** resources for company, industry, financial, market, and investment research
- **Social Sciences** resources for public opinion, workforce, demographic, and policy research
- **GIS & Spatial Data** resources for mapping, place-based analysis, and community research
- **News & Media** resources for current and historical reporting, advertising, and marketing research
- **Scholarly Literature** indexes and archives for citation tracking and literature review
